meta.title: Are We On The Right Track?
meta.description:
Madison Horn looks at how the world is likely to change in the next 3 years and how this will affect OT cybersecurity and cyber risk. Including:

- Technology Advancements: AI, quantum computing, robotics, AR, ...
- Global Hot Spots
- Sophisticated Cyber Attacks
- How To Navigate All This
